disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Potential case of rare and deadly hantavirus investigated at Bay Area prison - SFGATE
updates.body_en: Potential case of rare and deadly hantavirus investigated at Bay Area prison SFGATE
updates.summary_zh: 美国旧金山湾区监狱调查一例疑似汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Two more passengers exposed to hantavirus leave UNMC quarantine in Omaha - KETV
updates.body_en: Two more passengers exposed to hantavirus leave UNMC quarantine in Omaha KETV
updates.summary_zh: 美国内布拉斯加医学中心又有两名接触者结束隔离。

updates.title_en: US spends $750,000 to retrieve American from island after hantavirus isolation - Washington Examiner
updates.body_en: US spends $750,000 to retrieve American from island after hantavirus isolation Washington Examiner
updates.summary_zh: 美国花费75万美元从岛屿接回一名汉坦病毒隔离者。

updates.title_en: Prisoner at San Quentin may have hantavirus, authorities say - AOL.com
updates.body_en: Prisoner at San Quentin may have hantavirus, authorities say AOL.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国圣昆廷监狱一名囚犯可能感染汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: CDC and Florida at odds over hantavirus cruise ship passenger’s quarantine - NBC News
updates.body_en: CDC and Florida at odds over hantavirus cruise ship passenger’s quarantine NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC与佛罗里达州就邮轮乘客隔离问题存在分歧。

updates.title_en: US puts up $750K to evacuate an American who was aboard hantavirus cruise ship from remote island - CNN
updates.body_en: US puts up $750K to evacuate an American who was aboard hantavirus cruise ship from remote island CNN
updates.summary_zh: 美国出资75万美元从偏远岛屿撤离一名邮轮汉坦病毒接触者。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s Being Held ‘Hostage’ In Nebraska Quarantine (Latest Updates) - Forbes
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s Being Held ‘Hostage’ In Nebraska Quarantine (Latest Updates) Forbes
updates.summary_zh: 美国内布拉斯加州邮轮乘客称被隔离如人质。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship set to resume voyages after disinfection - Baird Maritime
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship set to resume voyages after disinfection Baird Maritime
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮消毒后拟恢复航行。

updates.title_en: Possible hantavirus case reported at San Quentin - NBC Bay Area
updates.body_en: Possible hantavirus case reported at San Quentin NBC Bay Area
updates.summary_zh: 美国圣昆廷监狱报告一例疑似汉坦病毒。

updates.body_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)

updates.body_en: Hantavirus update: 2 more cruise ship passengers leave National Quarantine Unit in Omaha WOWT

updates.body_en: Table for one: Exposed to deadly hantavirus, man is eating his way through quarantine Flatwater Free Press

updates.body_en: Hantavirus: UK Reports Confirmed Case in Tristan da Cunha, Says WHO Chief Health and Me

updates.body_en: Possible hantavirus case at San Quentin prompts testing, decontamination San Francisco Chronicle
